context_text: and I was the only one who had ever made signs.
mention_text: the only one who had ever made signs
normalized_context_text: and I was the only one who had ever made signs.
original_context_text: and I was [[the only one who had ever made signs]].
rendered_context_text: and I was the only one who had ever made signs.

context_text: Now I just had to remember the only one who had ever made signs existed and I would pass it again.
normalized_context_text: Now I just had to remember the only one who had ever made signs existed and I would pass it again.
original_context_text: Now I just had to remember [[the sign]] existed and I would pass it again.
rendered_context_text: Now I just had to remember the only one who had ever made signs existed and I would pass it again.
subject: the only one who had ever made signs

context_text: I was furiously impatient because I might encounter the only one who had ever made signs at any moment.
normalized_context_text: I was furiously impatient because I might encounter the only one who had ever made signs at any moment.
original_context_text: I was furiously impatient because I might encounter [[the sign]] at any moment.
rendered_context_text: I was furiously impatient because I might encounter the only one who had ever made signs at any moment.
subject: the only one who had ever made signs

context_text: At a point which had to be that very point, in the place of my sign, there was a shapeless scratch, a bruised, chipped abrasion of space.
normalized_context_text: At a point which had to be that very point, in the place of my sign, there was a shapeless scratch, a bruised, chipped abrasion of space.
original_context_text: At a point which had to be that very point, in [[the place of my sign]], there was a shapeless scratch, a bruised, chipped abrasion of space.
rendered_context_text: At a point which had to be that very point, in the place of my sign, there was a shapeless scratch, a bruised, chipped abrasion of space.
subject: the only one who had ever made signs

context_text: So it happened that I reached the point of my sign, and I found five, all there.
normalized_context_text: So it happened that I reached the point of my sign, and I found five, all there.
original_context_text: So it happened that I reached [[the point of my sign]], and I found five, all there.
rendered_context_text: So it happened that I reached the point of my sign, and I found five, all there.
subject: the only one who had ever made signs

context_text: I went on looking, and signs kept growing thicker in space; from all the worlds anybody who had an opportunity invariably left his mark in space somehow; and our world, too, every time I turned, I found more crowded, so that world and space seemed the mirror of each other, both minutely adorned with hieroglyphics and ideograms, each of which might be a sign and might not be: a calcareous concretion on basalt, a crest raised by the wind on the clotted sand of the desert, the arrangement of the eyes in a peacock's tail (gradually, living among signs had led us to see signs in countless things that, before, were there, marking nothing but their own presence; they had been transformed into the sign of themselves and had been added to the series of signs made on purpose by those who meant to make a sign ), the fire- streaks against a wall of schistose rock, the four-hundred-and-twenty-seventh groove—slightly crooked—of the cornice of a tomb's pediment, a sequence of streaks on a video during a thunderstorm (the series of signs was multiplied in the series of the signs of signs, of signs repeated countless times always the same and always somehow different because to the purposely made sign you had to add the sign that had happened there by chance), the badly inked tail of the letter R in an evening newspaper joined to a thready imperfection in the paper, one among the eight hundred thousand flakings of a tarred wall in the Melbourne docks, the curve of a graph, a skid-mark on the asphalt, a chromosome...
mention_text: those who meant to make a sign
